headline: Assurant and Cogeco Launch Mobile Device Solution for Canadian Customers
summary: TORONTO, July 23, 2026--Assurant, Inc. (NYSE: AIZ), a global company that redefines the boundaries of protection – safeguarding and servicing connected devices, homes, automobiles, and commercial equipment in partnership with the world’s most successful brands, today announced a strategic collaboration with Cogeco Communications Inc. to deliver a seamless, digital-first mobile device solution for Canadian customers. The solution includes access to a broad selection of network-compatible devices
